reviews.comment:
Un lugar clásico en la ruta 3. Ideal para descansar debajo de los árboles. Recomiendo pedir un sándwich completo de Jamón, súper grande. Excelente atención

(Translated by Google)
A classic spot on Route 3. Ideal for relaxing under the trees. I recommend ordering a huge ham sandwich. Excellent service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5b05mc0NnEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención al cliente tanto en surtidores como en el bar. Recomendable los sandwiches: de jamón crudo y queso, de salame completo. (Son premium...por eso se detienen los que van de paso).

(Translated by Google)
Excellent customer service both at the pumps and at the bar. The sandwiches are highly recommended: the prosciutto and cheese, and the whole salami. (They're premium...that's why passersby stop).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTcjRTOHNRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Cada vez peor. Nunca tienen débito. Carísima la NAFTA y los sandwiches que ya nos son gran cosa. No recomiendo para nada.

(Translated by Google)
It's getting worse and worse. They never accept debit cards. Gas is ridiculously expensive, and the sandwiches aren't even that great anymore. I wouldn't recommend it at all.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTODRIUjF3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Los mejores bañamos y parador de descanso

(Translated by Google)
The best bathing and rest stop
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTdy0zYjdRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Lindísimo parador, el predio es amplio y tranquilo, con mesas y asientos a la sombra de la arboleda. No le pongo 5 estrellas porque fui un domingo y a las 16 hs ya estaba cerrado el local de comida, no pude comprar nada.

(Translated by Google)
A lovely inn, the grounds are spacious and quiet, with tables and seats in the shade of the trees. I'm not giving it 5 stars because I went on a Sunday and the food stall was already closed by 4 p.m., so I couldn't buy anything.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTN1pmVVVBEAE

(Translated by Google)
